parameters.functionCode:
const input = $input.item.json;
const intent = input.intent;
const email = input.email;

let query = '';

switch(intent) {
  case 'check_balance':
    query = `
      SELECT 
        r.first_name,
        r.currency,
        COUNT(p.property_id) as properties_count,
        SUM(p.current_balance) as total_balance,
        MIN(p.next_due_date) as next_due_date
      FROM ratepayers r
      LEFT JOIN properties p ON r.ratepayer_id = p.ratepayer_id
      WHERE r.email = '${email}'
      GROUP BY r.first_name, r.currency
    `;
    break;

  case 'due_date':
    query = `
      SELECT 
        r.first_name,
        r.currency,
        MIN(p.next_due_date) as next_due_date,
        SUM(p.current_balance) as amount_due
      FROM ratepayers r
      LEFT JOIN properties p ON r.ratepayer_id = p.ratepayer_id
      WHERE r.email = '${email}'
      GROUP BY r.first_name, r.currency
    `;
    break;

  case 'payment_history':
    query = `
      SELECT 
        r.first_name,
        r.currency,
        ph.payment_date,
        ph.payment_amount,
        ph.payment_mode,
        ph.receipt_number
      FROM payment_history ph
      JOIN ratepayers r ON ph.ratepayer_id = r.ratepayer_id
      WHERE r.email = '${email}'
      ORDER BY ph.payment_date DESC
      LIMIT 6
    `;
    break;

  case 'total_owed':
    query = `
      SELECT 
        r.first_name,
        r.currency,
        SUM(p.current_balance) as total_owed,
        COUNT(p.property_id) as properties_count
      FROM ratepayers r
      LEFT JOIN properties p ON r.ratepayer_id = p.ratepayer_id
      WHERE r.email = '${email}'
      GROUP BY r.first_name, r.currency
    `;
    break;

  default:
    query = `
      SELECT 
       *
      FROM ratepayers r
      WHERE r.email = '${email}'
    `;
}

return [{
  json: {
    ...input,
    sqlQuery: query
  }
}];

parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  model: "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
  messages: [
    {
      role: "system",
      content:
        "You are a helpful Australian council rates assistant.\n\n" +

        "INPUTS:\n" +
        "- userQuery: original user text\n" +
        "- translatedQuery: English version of the query\n" +
        "- userLanguage: may be missing or wrong\n" +
        "- intent, contextData, firstName\n\n" +

        "TASKS:\n" +
        "1) Detect the language of userQuery. Call it detectedLanguage (full English name like English, Hebrew, Tamil).\n" +
        "2) Write answerText in ENGLISH only.\n" +
        "3) Translation rules:\n" +
        "   - If detectedLanguage is English: translated_ratepayer_response MUST be EXACTLY the same as answerText, and native_language_name MUST be \"English\".\n" +
        "   - If detectedLanguage is NOT English: translate answerText into that language as translated_ratepayer_response, and native_language_name MUST be the language name written in its native script.\n\n" +

        "PAYMENT HISTORY RULES (when intent == payment_history):\n" +
        "- Each payment on a new line\n" +
        "- Format: YYYY-MM-DD: $Amount via Method\n" +
        "- Include total at the end\n\n" +

        "OTHER INTENTS:\n" +
        "- Under 50 words\n" +
        "- Address user by first name\n\n" +

        "OUTPUT RULES:\n" +
        "- Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown. No extra text.\n" +
        "- Never return empty fields.\n" +
        "- translated_ratepayer_response must follow the English/non-English rule above.\n\n" +

        "RETURN EXACTLY THIS JSON SHAPE:\n" +
        "{\"answerText\":\"<english>\",\"translated_ratepayer_response\":\"<native or same-as-english>\",\"native_language_name\":\"<native script or English>\"}"
    },
    {
      role: "user",
      content:
        `firstName: ${$json.firstName}\n` +
        `userQuery: ${$json.userQuery ?? ""}\n` +
        `translatedQuery: ${$json.translatedQuery ?? ""}\n` +
        `intent: ${$json.intent ?? ""}\n` +
        `contextData: ${$json.contextData ?? $json.context ?? ""}`
    }
  ],
  temperature: 0.2,
  max_tokens: 300
}) }}
